name: Maloney's Mechanism
explicitMods: Has 2 Sockets
Trigger a Socketed Bow Skill when you Attack with a Bow, with a 1 second Cooldown
11% increased Attack Speed
+58 to maximum Life
5% chance to Blind Enemies on Hit with Attacks
flavourText: Midnight tinkering begets midday murdering;
a sinister shaft surreptitiously shot slays a scoundrel.
I will see them again, but not until my work is done.

socketedItems.secDescrText:
Supports any skill gem.
Cannot support skills that don't come from gems.
explicitMods: +1 to Level of Supported Skill Gems
+8% to Quality of Supported Skill Gems
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: "Although we are two bodies, we are of one mind, one heart, drifting
through the cosmos, in search of purpose. The moment we cross paths,
both fleeting and eternal, our eyes are opened to our potential."

name: Foulborn Berek's Respite
explicitMods: Adds 25 to 52 Fire Damage to Spells and Attacks
33% increased Lightning Damage
+37 to maximum Mana
When you Kill an Ignited Enemy, inflict an equivalent Ignite on each nearby Enemy

Shocked Enemies you Kill Explode, dealing 6% of
their Life as Lightning Damage which cannot Shock
flavourText: "With Flame licking at his heels
Berek berated the clouds
Until vengeful Storm spewed forth his rains
And Berek held on tight
As Fire screamed and steamed
And fled."
- Berek and the Untamed

name: Widowhail
explicitMods: 224% increased bonuses gained from Equipped Quiver
flavourText: "I loosed a volley of arrows into the heart of the man
who slew my beloved. There was no satisfaction, no
healing, no revenge. There was only... emptiness."
- Chieftainess Ahuana of the Ramako Tribe
